org.kink_lang.kink.VecVal

Description
org.kink_lang.kink
The core package of the Kink vm.
org.kink_lang.kink.internal.intrinsicsupport
Provides funs used from intrinsics.

  • Uses of VecVal in org.kink_lang.kink

    Methods in org.kink_lang.kink that return VecVal
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    VecVal
    VecHelper.of()
    Returns a new empty vec.
    VecVal
    VecHelper.of(List<? extends Val> elems)
    Returns a vec containing the elems.
    VecVal
    VecHelper.of(Val e0)
    Returns a new vec.
    VecVal
    VecHelper.of(Val... elems)
    Returns a new vec.
    VecVal
    VecHelper.of(Val[] vals, int from, int to)
    Returns a new vec from the range of the array.
    VecVal
    VecHelper.of(Val e0, Val e1)
    Returns a new vec.
    VecVal
    VecHelper.of(Val e0, Val e1, Val e2)
    Returns a new vec.
    VecVal
    VecHelper.of(Val e0, Val e1, Val e2, Val e3)
    Returns a new vec.
